title: Luminous Tides Second Movement
prompt: Instrumental only. This is the second movement of a continuous late-night focus piece, so begin already settled rather than with a new intro. Keep the same sonic family throughout: warm Rhodes chords, soft analog bass pulse, distant tape texture, minimal brushed percussion, spacious nocturnal reverb, and no vocals. For the first minute, continue quietly with a slightly darker chord color; around the middle, introduce a small shimmering harmonic response and a gentle bass variation; in the final minute, remove detail and glide toward a warm, unresolved release. Low-to-medium dynamics only. No abrupt drop, no dramatic build, no harsh highs, no busy hi-hats, no bright solo lead, no trailer impacts, and no obvious loop point.
